name: hudu-mcp
description: Every Hudu cmdlet, plus an offline SQLite mirror, cross-entity audits, and agent-native output no PowerShell module or read-only MCP ships.

hudu_api_key.title: HUDU_API_KEY
hudu_api_key.description:
Raw Hudu API key sent as the `x-api-key` header (no Bearer prefix). Create it in
the Hudu portal: Admin -> API Keys. Keys may be global or company-scoped; company-scoped keys cannot
call the global `assets list` endpoint (use `assets list-by-company`).

hudu_base_url.title: HUDU_BASE_URL
hudu_base_url.description:
Your Hudu instance's API base URL, including the /api/v1 path, e.g.
https://your-subdomain.huducloud.com/api/v1 (self-hosted, *.huducloud.com, or a custom domain).
